effective_labels.description: Labels applied to the function for organization and management

environment.description: Runtime environment details for the cloud function

id.description: Unique identifier for referencing the function in configurations

name.description: The name of the Cloud Function

state.description: Current operational state of the cloud function

terraform_labels.description: Labels defined in Terraform for resource management

update_time.description: Timestamp of the last update to the function

url.description: Endpoint URL for accessing the cloud function
